parse.title: Infinity Edge
parse.wikitext:
: ''For the removed {{ai|Living Forge|Ornn|Masterwork}} items, see {{ii|Edge of Finality}} and {{ii|Molten Edge}}.''
{{Item info
|goldvalue = 
|goldefficiency =
|similaritems = Yun Tal Wildarrows;Essence Reaver;The Collector;Immortal Shieldbow;Hexoptics C44;Stormrazor;Bloodthirster
|background = Only the boldest of men and women dare take the risky trip to the hottest spot in [[Valoran]], in the very center of the [[Shurima]] Desert. Those who successfully make the journey may bathe their swords in a magical pool of the purest water known to this world. Any edge dipped into this pool will stay sharper and strike truer than any other sword.
|notes =
* The critical strike damage stat provided by '''Infinity Edge''' increases most champions' total {{stil|{{as|critical strike damage|critical damage}}}} from {{as|200% AD}} to {{as|{{#expr:200+30}}% AD}}.
|strategy = 
|trivia = 
* '''Infinity Edge''' shares its name with a set of Infinity Weapons from the game ''[[Wikipedia:Lineage II|Lineage II]],'' which are the strongest weapons available. '''Infinity Edge''' bears similarities to the [https://l2vn.com/upload/images/InfinityShaper.png Infinity Shaper].
* As hinted in its lore, the Infinity Edge got its powers from the ''Oasis of the Dawn'' located in the Ancient [[Shurima]]n Capital, the once center of the vast Shuriman Empire. The Oasis is described as a pool with many magical properties.
* {{ii|Infinity Edge|image=Infinity Edge item old.png}} was in the old [[Summoner's Rift]] map, specifically in the [[shop]]keeper's bag.
** It is still hung on display in both shops.
* '''Infinity Edge''' looks somewhat similar to {{cis|Kayle|variant=old3}} old {{ai|Righteous Fury|Kayle|sword}} in terms of blade shape and inscriptions.
* {{Univ|Pentakill|Pentakill's}} second volume, [[Pentakill II: Grasp of the Undying]], named its fourth track after this item.
* This item was featured in [[The Call]] and [[Katarina: Issue 4]].
[[File:Shurima Crest icon.png|link=Shurima#Trivia|100px|center]]
|media = 
|revisions = 
|patchhistory =

** Combine cost increased to {{g|625}} from {{g|525}}.

;[[V14.6]]

** Combine cost reduced to {{g|525}} from {{g|625}}.
* Critical strike damage reduced to 40% from 45%.
* {{sbc|Removed:}} No longer has a Mythic passive granting {{as|5 '''bonus''' attack damage}} per Legendary item.
* No longer limits the user to 1 {{sbc|Mythic}} item.
* Now limits the user to 1 {{sbc|Unbounded}} item.
